choices.text: alert(msg, alert.freq_once_per_bar_close) — fires only after bar closes. Prevents intra-bar flicker. Matches backtest signals. freq_all spams; freq_once_per_bar may still flicker on tick updates.
Pine alert → TradingView webhook URL → your endpoint (Cloudflare Workers/Vercel) → broker API → order. JSON in alert message; endpoint parses + auths + places.

questions.explanation: Webhook URL bridges Pine alerts to broker APIs.

choices.text: Random secret in URL + Bearer token + IP whitelist + HMAC signature. Public webhook URLs are attackable; anyone can POST. Layer defenses prevent unauthorized order placement.

questions.explanation: Auth tokens + IP whitelist + HMAC for webhook security.

choices.text: Heartbeat (hourly alert + external monitor) + order logging + position reconciliation + daily loss limit + kill switch + broker health check. Catches dead pipelines, missed orders, regime changes early.

questions.explanation: Heartbeat + reconciliation + kill switch = production maturity.

choices.text: Multiple uncorrelated strategies (correlation <0.3): trend + mean-reversion + breakout work in different regimes. Sum = smoother equity curve. Risk-budget capital across them; cap aggregate daily exposure.

questions.explanation: Uncorrelated strategies + risk budget = real portfolio.
